_publications._publicationTitle: MIA is a potential biomarker for tumour load in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: MIA was immunohistochemically detected on the paraffin sections of six cutaneous and three plexiform neurofibromas and in seven MPNSTs from NF1 patients. The typical pattern of MIA staining was a mixture of positive and negative nuclei side-by-side
details: Successfully detected MIA in NF1-associated tumors with typical pattern of positive and negative nuclei side-by-side, with 50-90% positive cells
